title: Looking for trailers
wikitext:
[]: Looking for trailers...             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Jan 28, 2005 9:14 am ...anyone have or know of a place where I can acquire (not just watch) trailers for both the series and for the original theatrical release of EoE--on my dvd there are a few trailers for EoE but not the original one that aired in Japan--any clues, guesses?? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 28, 2005 12:07 pm Trailers for the series (can't remember with regard to the movies) are available on the Renewal Bonus Disk. Some trailers for the movies are included with Manga's domestic releases.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Jan 28, 2005 1:08 pm Reichu wrote: Trailers for the series (can't remember with regard to the movies) are available on the Renewal Bonus Disk. Some trailers for the movies are included with Manga's domestic releases.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 28, 2005 2:37 pm bp32 wrote: Yeah, I have the Manga DVD--does the Bonus Disk have the original Japanese trailer--think it incorporated some live action scences as well as the few lines of dialogue that were on the movie poster (i.e. all the females floating in LCL with Rei standing above them)??

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Jan 28, 2005 3:05 pm Reichu wrote: bp32 wrote: Yeah, I have the Manga DVD--does the Bonus Disk have the original Japanese trailer--think it incorporated some live action scences as well as the few lines of dialogue that were on the movie poster (i.e. all the females floating in LCL with Rei standing above them)??
